header.location: Portland, OR (Open to Remote or Relocation)

summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Strategic Program Manager who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can drive operational excellence—through human-centered, data-driven approaches.

bullets.text: Partner with {cross|10+ vendors} and Marketing, Tech, and Sales to drive accountability and {prog|continuous improvement} across 20+ programs
Build {data|reporting and review materials} from program metrics and stakeholder feedback to surface trends and improvement opportunities
Establish {cross|cross-functional} processes and documentation for 70+ staff, streamlining operations and reducing onboarding time by 75%
Facilitate listening sessions with 25 global {cross|stakeholders}, translating feedback into 3 new programs and a 78% enrollment rate
Facilitate CEO/HR discovery and stakeholder interviews to diagnose performance drivers and inform evidence-based process redesigns
Upskill the team to audit 300+ cases and quantify costs, refuting assumptions via {data|data analysis} to drive policy and process change
Led a manager {ex|effectiveness} initiative, transforming {data|feedback data} into actionable scorecards and reports that informed strategy
Analyzed 2,000+ employee responses, reporting {data|data-driven insights} and recommendations to the C-suite
Provided consultations to improve strategic plans and internal training on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review
Improved {ex|experience} via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects focusing on survey development, rewards & recognition, and L&D
Optimized onboarding processes across 3 global locations by conducting process analysis and clarifying job responsibilities
Delivered strategic HR solutions for business priorities across employee relations, headcount, and succession planning
Directed a Merger & Acquisition project, migrating and merging employee records across systems
Piloted an Inclusive Leadership workshop for 12 senior leaders, later scaled to 23 global locations
Developed proficiency across various HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to performance management
Filled a challenging international role by drafting job descriptions, posting openings, and researching global compensation details
Engaged global talent via personalized communication and customer service, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants

changeLog: 2026-05-30: Tailored for Chime — Program Manager, Performance Effectiveness (Remote/SF → Portland header). Summary → Strategic Program Manager, operational-excellence flavor. InGenius → Set F/B: vendor partnership + accountability + continuous improvement, reporting/review materials from metrics, cross-functional processes, listening sessions + 78% enrollment. Reordered to lead with vendor/accountability bullet (BPO-partnership resonance). ODN → Pair B + audit/quantification. NextGen → scorecards framing + 'manager effectiveness' (direct match to 'performance effectiveness'). Vestas → strategic HR solutions. Skills → dropped HRCI/LMS. NOTE: JD wants contact-center/BPO quality + AI/ML evaluation systems — partial gap; tailored to truthful performance-framework/reporting/vendor/continuous-improvement overlap.
